description: Web development documentation corpus for SWEObeyMe
purpose: Provide comprehensive web development documentation for HTML, CSS, DOM, and web APIs

documents.title: HTML Standard
documents.author: WHATWG
documents.relevance: Understanding HTML5 specification for web development

documents.title: CSS: Cascading Style Sheets
documents.author: MDN
documents.relevance: Understanding CSS3 specification for web development

documents.title: Document Object Model (DOM)
documents.author: MDN
documents.description: Comprehensive DOM API documentation from MDN

documents.title: Using the Fetch API

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from WHATWG HTML specification, MDN Web Docs, and reputable web development resources. Prioritize official WHATWG and MDN documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: spec_name.html, api_name.html
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official WHATWG and MDN documentation.
instructions.webFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand HTML5 specification, (2) use CSS3 correctly, (3) manipulate the DOM properly, (4) use Fetch API correctly, (5) follow web security best practices.
